title: Russian Bean Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew originating from Russia, made with tender black beans, tangy Russian spices, and a hint of fluffy texture.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high.
Add diced beef, if using, and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add chopped onion, carrot, and celery to the pot, cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add tomato paste, cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add beef broth, thyme, and browned beef, if using. Stir to combine.
Add black beans, pickle relish, and mashed potatoes. Stir to combine.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
